Joinder In Defendant Shuyi (Selene) Gao'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stay Of Proceedings
Off Calendar Nov-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BYTEDANCE INC.'S JOINDER IN DEFENDANT SHUYI (SELENE) GAO'S MOTION FOR STAY OF PROCEEDINGS

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling: See ruling on Shuyi (Selene) Gao's motion for stay of proceedings. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stay Of Proceedings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SHUYI (SELENE) GAO'S MOTION FOR STAY OF PROCEEDINGS

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Shuyi Gao's motion for stay of proceedings is granted under CCP 1281.4 and the court's inherent powers, in the interests of justice and efficiency. (See OTO, L.L.C. v. Kho (2019) 8 Cal.5th 111, 141.) The stay shall remain in effect until the federal court rules on the motion to compel arbitration before it and, if that motion is granted, until the arbitration's completion. Thereafter, any party may file a regular noticed motion to lift the stay. Order signed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/RBU)
